title: ​The EBA updates list of other systemically important institutions
clean_title: ​The EBA updates list of other systemically important institutions
summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) today updated the list of other systemically important institutions (O-SIIs) in the EU, based on notifications received from national authorities during 2025.
